patient_summary: Olivia is a 73-year-old female (DOB 05/05/1952). Active problems documented include Mixed dyslipidemia (primary), Essential hypertension (benign), Leg pain, Postoperative anemia, and Unspecified anemia. Notable laboratory abnormalities from 07/03/2023 include Ferritin 266.8 (H) ng/mL; Iron 41 (L) ug/dL; Iron Saturation 15% (L); eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L) ml/min/1.73m2; Chloride 108 (H) mmol/L; Triglycerides 158 (H) mg/dL; VLDL 32 (H) mg/dL. TSH Ultra Sensitive 1.320 mIU/mL and LDL Calculated 62 mg/dL recorded. Functional assessment documents difficulty walking/climbing stairs. Primary care is Hand, Hoyet A, MD (PCP). Multiple upcoming specialty and primary care appointments are listed through 11/26/2024. All information is sourced to the Singing River Health System progress note and lab results.
